name: LGF Bookings
upgrade_notice: Fix footer off-screen — 100vh includes browser chrome on tablets. Use window.innerHeight.

sections.description: WordPress-native hotel CRM with calendar, bookings, guests, Invoice Ninja integration, and GitHub-based updating.
sections.changelog:
• 1.9.2.57: Fix footer off-screen — 100vh includes browser chrome in windowed mode on tablets. Set #app height to window.innerHeight (actual visible height). Recalc on resize and fullscreen change.
  • 1.9.2.56: Normal-flow footer (not absolute) inside ticket panel. Panel is flex child of .main (not absolute). Removes all height-propagation ambiguity — footer always at panel bottom.
  • 1.9.2.55: Fix footer clipped by overflow:hidden — main was missing position:relative so panel referenced viewport (100vh). Toggle panel margin via .panel-visible class. Hide panel initially in HTML.
  • 1.9.2.54: Absolute position ticket panel (top:0;right:0;bottom:0) — guarantees deterministic height, fixes footer off-screen on all browsers.
  • 1.9.2.53: Absolute position ticket footer at panel bottom. Add close button to pay modal.
  • 1.9.2.52: Add min-height:0 to .main and .ticket-panel — fix footer buttons pushed off-screen.
  • 1.9.2.51: Remove await_next_action from CONFIRMATION action — was keeping action in limbo, preventing COMPLETED status and checkout chain.
  • 1.9.2.50: Fix device_id placement in CreateTerminalAction — must be a direct field of the action object, not device_options sub-object or top-level.
  • 1.9.2.49: Fix Square API error 'action.device_options is unrecognized' — device_id must be at top level of CreateTerminalAction request.
  • 1.9.2.48: Add error div inside pay modal — pay flow errors were hidden behind modal overlay.
  • 1.9.2.47: Fix missing showPayError function — was breaking error display and button state in pay flow.
  • 1.9.2.46: Fix ticket footer buttons off-screen in non-fullscreen mode — add overflow:hidden and min-height:0 to ticket-panel.
  • 1.9.2.45: Fix colon in action_id route regex — Square IDs contain colons so polling endpoint was returning 404.
  • 1.9.2.44: Bill review on terminal before payment via CONFIRMATION action. Print button removed.
  • 1.9.2.43: Print ticket button on /terminal/ page. Tip screen disabled on terminal.
  • 1.9.2.42: Fullscreen toggle button + pinch zoom for /terminal/ on iPad.
  • 1.9.2.41: Fix missing require_once includes (corrupted file). Deactivate + reactivate the plugin if needed.
  • 1.9.2.40: Remove auto-flush rewrite rules. Visit Settings > Permalinks to enable /terminal/.
  • 1.9.2.39: Fix terminal/index.php PHP syntax error.
  • 1.9.2.37: NEW: Square Terminal Web App at /terminal/. Full-screen touch-optimized ticket UI, native Terminal SDK payment or API fallback, auto nonce refresh.
  • 1.9.2.36: Collapsible categories, favorites (star toggle), button click animation on catalog items table.
  • 1.9.2.35: Bulk actions for catalog items — delete selected, set category. Select-all checkbox and JS-powered bulk UI.
  • 1.9.2.34: Fix missing category column — graceful fallback, repair button, sample CSV download.
  • 1.9.2.33: Fix CSV import for Square exports — handles variation names (e.g. Beer (Pint)), reports DB errors, re-fetches count after import.
  • 1.9.2.32: Inline add/edit/delete for catalog items in Settings. Each row is an editable form with name, category, price, square_id fields.
  • 1.9.2.31: Catalog items now have category field (rooms, dinner, other). CSV import supports 'category' column. Ticket page groups items by category. Pay modal shows room charges + taxe de séjour checked by default. Ticket items now added to booking extras_amount and total_amount.
  • 1.9.2.30: Tickets page: added nocache_headers() + cache-busting timestamp to fix stale data on GET requests across devices.
  • 1.9.2.29: Tickets page: layout change — bookings now at top (horizontal flex-wrap cards), catalog underneath. Removed side-by-side flex layout.
  • 1.9.2.28: Tickets page: fixed 'appendChild parameter is not a Node' — el() helper now wraps string children in createTextNode().
  • 1.9.2.27: Tickets page: fixed REST API permission denied — fetch() calls now send X-WP-Nonce header for cookie authentication.
  • 1.9.2.26: Tickets page: fixed JS bugs — missing hideError() function, added error handling on failed API calls.
  • 1.9.2.25: New Tickets / Bar Orders page under LGF Bookings menu. POS-style interface: date picker, booking list, catalog item grid, add/remove items, Pay with Square Terminal.
  • 1.9.2.24: Terminal checkout note now shows guest name (e.g. 'John Smith — #123') instead of just 'Booking #123'. Makes it clear who you're charging on the terminal screen.
  • 1.9.2.23: New Square features: manual payment amount input (override the booking total), skip receipt screen checkbox, refund button (full or partial) from booking detail and guest detail pages. Refund updates payment_status to refunded.
  • 1.9.2.22: Fixed cancel checkout not refreshing page — added location.reload() so Pay with Square Terminal button reappears immediately.
  • 1.9.2.21: Added Terminal Mode section to Square Payments settings page with standalone vs Terminal API instructions, Generate Device Code button for re-pairing, and auto-fill of Device ID on re-pair.
  • 1.9.2.20: Fixed Square cancel checkout error — cancel endpoint does not accept idempotency_key in body. Now sends empty body.
  • 1.9.2.19: Fixed Square Terminal payment section missing from booking detail page — was only rendered on guest detail page. Now shows Pay with Square Terminal button on booking detail page.
  • 1.9.2.18: Fixed Square checkout not working — Terminal API requires device_id in checkout requests. Added Device ID field to Square settings and included device_options in Terminal checkout requests.
  • 1.9.2.17: Square Terminal API integration — paired terminal, added webhook endpoint (simple-hotel-crm/v1/square-webhook) for auto-payment confirmation, Square settings now show webhook URL + signature key field, fixed CSRF on square_confirm GET endpoint, added user feedback on missing checkout.
  • 1.9.2.16: ICS export now auto-syncs on new booking creation, booking deletion, transfer, and merge — no need to manually click 'Regenerate All ICS Feeds'. Previously only updated on booking edit.
  • 1.9.2.15: Fixed extras not displaying after save — SQL error in get_booking_items_by_room used wrong column name (room_sync_id vs room_id). Extras now save and display correctly.
  • 1.9.2.14: Fixed extras not saving — root cause was PHP parse error from single-quoted console.log inside echo that killed the entire file before form handler could run. Removed debug noise.
  • 1.9.2.13: Debug: added wp_die(var_export($_POST)) in form handler to diagnose pending_items not saving.
  • 1.9.2.12: Fixed JavaScript syntax error in extras functionality — console.log statements with single quotes were conflicting with PHP echo statement quotes, causing parse error on booking detail page.
  • 1.9.2.11: Fixed critical error on Square settings save — general settings handler was incorrectly triggered on all tabs, and missing argument in update_option() caused crash.
  • 1.9.2.10: Square Terminal payments — add API credentials in Settings → Square Payments, then 'Pay with Square Terminal' button on booking detail page. Auto-creates IN invoice on payment confirmation. New DB columns: payment_status, payment_method, square_checkout_id.
